channel.title: YouTube Intelligence Brief
channel.description: Daily intelligence brief synthesizing trends, hot topics, and cross-channel convergence from a 53-channel YouTube monitoring network.
channel.itunes:author: Knowledge Studio
channel.itunes:summary: Daily intelligence brief synthesizing trends, hot topics, and cross-channel convergence from a 53-channel YouTube monitoring network.

item.title: Claude's Coding Dominance Ends as GPT-5.5 Takes Over
item.description:
Welcome back. Let's walk through what's happening in the creator ecosystem right now, because there are some genuinely important shifts buried in today's signal mix.
We're starting with something that feels subtle on the surface but actually represents the first real model hierarchy change we've se...

item.title: AI Shifts From Capability to Real-World Problem Solving
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back.
There's a real inflection happening right now in how AI is being used to actually build things, and I want to walk you through what we're seeing because it reshapes some fundamental assumptions about where this technology is headed.
Let's start with the biggest signal. ...

item.title: How AI's API Layer Is Quietly Collapsing Now
item.description:
Welcome to the show. Today, we're looking at what might be the most consequential shift in how AI actually gets built and deployed—and it's happening faster than the venture playbooks can even document.
Let's start with the headline: the API layer is collapsing, and most people still don't realize ...

item.description:

item.title: YouTube Intelligence Brief — March 19, 2026
